contexts.text: Sample Enterprise Policy This mock policy document is provided for local development and testing only. Access Control Employees should use approved systems for handling internal knowledge and customer-facing responses. Production systems must enforce least-privilege access, audit logging, and data retention policies. AI Usage AI-generated responses should cite source material where possible, avoid exposing sensitive information, and route uncertain or high-risk cases for human review.
